name: Infinity Cube Fidget
description: A mesmerizing fidget toy that endlessly folds into itself. Perfect for keeping your hands busy and your mind focused.

name: Customizable Name Tag
description: A personalized name tag for your desk, backpack, or keys. Enter your name and choose your color!

name: Spinning Gyroscope
description: A high-precision, long-spinning gyroscope that demonstrates principles of physics while being incredibly satisfying to use.

name: Modern Bird Feeder
description: A sleek and durable 3D printed bird feeder. Attract beautiful birds to your yard with this modern design.

name: Personalized Pet Bowl
description: A custom 3D printed bowl with your pet's name. Available in multiple sizes and colors.

name: Articulated Flexi-Rex
description: A fun and flexible T-Rex dinosaur that can be posed in countless ways. A great desk toy or gift.
